DEFT'S MOTION FOR FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT WAS HEARD IN #210 JUDGE. J. ROBERTSON,II AFTER HEARING ORAL ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION FOR FURTHER STAY IN EFFECT 45 DAYS AND IN CONDITIONED ON THE DEFTS REMAINING CURRENT WITH RENT DUE TO PLTFS AND THE COURT SETS A STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB.8,01 IN DEPT. 302. PLTFS' COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND ORDER SUBMIT IT TO DEFTS' COUNSEL FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM, AND THEN TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE.
